response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance by VTuber Kazama Iroha. 2. Identified two songs: '白線' and '未来カンパネラ' from on-screen text. 3. Researched '白線' (Nayutalien) and '未来カンパネラ' (Kohei Yamada, Taira Yamashita). 4. Search results indicated these are original songs; publicly indexed lyrics could not be found via standard search. 5. Lyrics provided as null in the JSON response as a result.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance by VTuber Kazama Iroha, including an original song '白線' and a duet performance of '未来カンパネラ'.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs the song '白線' (Hakusen) on a vibrant, colorful stage with bright lighting. Lyrics are displayed on the screen.
Kazama Iroha and a guest performer (Hakui Koyori) perform '未来カンパネラ' (Mirai Campanella) on stage. Lyrics are displayed on screen.
